nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Receives POST from Supabase Database Webhook on INSERT to events table

nodes.name: Sweeper Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every 5 minutes to catch missed events (Belt & Suspenders)

nodes.name: Transform Webhook Payload
nodes.notes: Normalizes Supabase webhook payload to match sweeper format

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  e.id,
  e.project_id,
  e.event_type::TEXT as event_type,
  e.payload,
  e.created_at,
  e.source_system,
  e.source_flow,
  r.target_workflow,
  r.webhook_url
FROM events e
JOIN event_routing r ON e.event_type::TEXT = r.event_type
WHERE e.processed_at IS NULL
  AND r.is_active = true
  AND e.created_at < now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
ORDER BY e.created_at ASC
LIMIT 50;

nodes.name: Fetch Unprocessed Events
nodes.notes: Sweeper: Fetches events older than 2 minutes that haven't been processed

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  target_workflow,
  webhook_url
FROM event_routing
WHERE event_type = '{{ $('Transform Webhook Payload').item.json.event_type }}'
  AND is_active = true;

nodes.name: Lookup Routing
nodes.notes: Looks up target workflow from event_routing table

nodes.name: Merge Routing Info
nodes.notes: Combines event with its routing destination

nodes.name: Mark as Sweeper
nodes.notes: Marks items from sweeper path for debugging

nodes.name: Merge Both Paths
nodes.notes: Combines webhook and sweeper paths into single stream

nodes.name: Has Routing?
nodes.notes: Only process events that have a webhook_url configured

parameters.query:
UPDATE events 
SET processed_at = now() 
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'::uuid
  AND processed_at IS NULL
RETURNING id, event_type::text, processed_at;

nodes.name: Mark as Processed
nodes.notes: Marks the event as processed to prevent re-processing

nodes.name: Done
nodes.notes: Final output node

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO dispatch_errors (
  event_id,
  event_type,
  target_workflow,
  webhook_url,
  error_message,
  error_code
) VALUES (
  NULLIF('{{ $json._error.event_id }}', '')::uuid,
  '{{ $json._error.event_type }}',
  '{{ $json._error.target_workflow }}',
  '{{ $json._error.webhook_url }}',
  '{{ $json._error.error_message }}',
  '{{ $json._error.error_code }}'
)
RETURNING id;
